d2e1_hire_candidate.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_hire_candidate.text: Day 2! Your laundromat is getting some attention. A job seeker just walked in asking about work. How do you handle it?

d2e1_candidate_talk.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_candidate_talk.text: Hi! I heard your laundromat is doing well. I have experience in retail and I'm a hard worker. Any openings?

choices.text: Ask for a resume and schedule interview
Politely decline — not ready to hire
Offer a paid trial day first

d2e1_hire_yes.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_hire_yes.text: Really?! Thank you so much! I'll start right away and help with the laundry!

d2e1_hire_interview.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_hire_interview.text: Of course! That's very professional. I'll send my resume right away.

d2e1_hire_decline.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_hire_decline.text: Oh, I understand. Good luck with your laundromat! Maybe another time.

d2e1_hire_trial.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_hire_trial.text: A paid trial day? Sure, I'm confident in my skills. When do I start?

d2e1_result_yes.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_result_yes.text: Bold but risky! Hiring without screening can lead to mismatches. Always have a process, even if simple.

d2e1_result_interview.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_result_interview.text: Smart move! A proper hiring process protects your laundromat and respects the candidate.

d2e1_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_result_decline.text: Knowing your limits is wisdom. Hiring before you're ready creates more problems than it solves.

d2e1_result_trial.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_result_trial.text: Creative approach! Paid trial periods let both sides assess fit before committing. Low risk, high reward.

d2e2_competitor.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_competitor.text: Midday! A new laundromat just opened two blocks away, advertising lower prices. Some customers are noticing.

d2e2_competitor_choice.speaker: You
d2e2_competitor_choice.text: A price war could hurt my margins, but doing nothing feels wrong...

choices.text: Focus on cleaner machines and better service

d2e2_match.speaker: Regular Customer
d2e2_match.text: Oh nice, same price as the new place! But I still prefer your machines honestly.

d2e2_quality.speaker: Regular Customer
d2e2_quality.text: I tried the new place, but your machines are cleaner and the detergent smells better. Worth every extra peso!

d2e2_promo.speaker: Regular Customer
d2e2_promo.text: A loyalty card? Perfect timing! I was thinking of trying the new place, but this keeps me here.

d2e2_ignore.speaker: Regular Customer
d2e2_ignore.text: Hey, the new place is cheaper. Are you going to do anything about that?

d2e2_result_match.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_result_match.text: Price matching is costly and unsustainable long term. Competing on value beats competing on price.

d2e2_result_quality.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_result_quality.text: Excellent instinct! Differentiation through clean machines and better service is a powerful advantage.

d2e2_result_promo.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_result_promo.text: Smart tactical move! Short-term promotions can retain customers without permanently cutting margins.

d2e2_result_ignore.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_result_ignore.text: Ignoring competition is dangerous. You must always be aware of your market and adapt accordingly.

d2e3_customer_request.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_customer_request.text: Late afternoon. Your largest washing machine just broke down, and a customer with a big load really needs it.

d2e3_request.speaker: Customer
d2e3_request.text: I have a huge comforter that only fits in that machine. Is there any way you can help me?

choices.text: Suggest they try the laundromat down the street
Take their number and call when fixed

d2e3_repair.speaker: Customer
d2e3_repair.text: You called someone right away? That's incredible service! I'll wait and tell everyone about this place.

d2e3_suggest.speaker: Customer
d2e3_suggest.text: Really? Just like that? I drove all the way here. Very disappointing.

d2e3_notify.speaker: Customer
d2e3_notify.text: Oh, that's so thoughtful! Yes please, here's my number. I appreciate the personal touch!

d2e3_handwash.speaker: Customer
d2e3_handwash.text: You'd hand-wash it yourself? That's above and beyond! I'm definitely coming back and bringing friends.

d2e3_result_repair.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_result_repair.text: Taking immediate action builds trust. The cost was real, but so is the word-of-mouth you just earned.

d2e3_result_suggest.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_result_suggest.text: Sending customers to competitors is never a good strategy. Always offer alternatives, even imperfect ones.

d2e3_result_notify.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_result_notify.text: Smart relationship building! Following up with customers creates trust and brings them back.

d2e3_result_handwash.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_result_handwash.text: Going above and beyond creates legendary service stories. That customer will never forget what you did.
